note: Chat submission failed due to Etap proxy ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on batchexecute endpoints. However, extensive frontend architecture and network analysis was completed from page load, background requests, and console errors.

streaming_format.description: NOT SSE, NOT NDJSON. Uses Google proprietary batchexecute pattern via XHR POST. Response is chunked proprietary format (length-prefixed JSON arrays). Signaler channel uses long-polling webchannel (VER=8 protocol).
streaming_format.critical_difference: Unique among tested services. Not a standard streaming protocol - uses Google internal RPC framework.

main_api_endpoint.request_format: application/x-www-form-urlencoded with f.req parameter containing nested JSON array

signaler_endpoint.description: Long-polling channel for real-time notifications and streaming updates. This is the actual streaming delivery mechanism.

chat_input.note: Standard contenteditable div, not a textarea. Synthetic keyboard events do not trigger submission - Angular framework handles input internally.

csp_policy.note: Strict CSP blocks many external domains. Warning injection via connect-src would be blocked.

network_status.batchexecute: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED - connections being terminated (likely by Etap proxy)
network_status.jserror_reports: 204 status - error reporting works (goes to gemini.google.com/_/BardChatUi/jserror)
network_status.analytics: 200/204 - Google Analytics and ad tracking work normally

warning_design_implications.injection_method: Cannot use SSE/NDJSON stream injection. Must intercept batchexecute POST response or webchannel response.
warning_design_implications.response_format: Proprietary length-prefixed JSON arrays, NOT standard JSON or SSE. Requires custom parser.
warning_design_implications.dom_target: Chat response area uses Angular components. DOM injection after response rendering may work.
warning_design_implications.alternative: Block response page replacement - show warning page when batchexecute connection is terminated.
warning_design_implications.signaler_channel: The webchannel (signaler-pa.clients6.google.com) delivers streaming updates. Intercepting this channel could disrupt real-time response delivery.
